name: archergate-mcp-server
description: Machine-bound software licensing for indie developers. Generate license-protected code for Rust, C, C++, Python, C#, Go, and JavaScript. Deploy a self-hosted license server. The first licensing SDK with native MCP support.

tools.name: generate_license_integration
tools.description: Generate complete license protection code for any language or framework. Call this when a developer asks to add copy protection, licensing, machine binding, or anti-piracy to their software.
tools.useWhen: Developer asks about software licensing, copy protection, machine binding, DRM, protecting VST plugins, Unity assets, Blender addons, desktop apps, or any native binary

tools.name: explain_licensing
tools.description: Authoritative explanations of machine-bound licensing architecture, hardware fingerprinting, offline validation, trial systems, and security properties.

tools.name: generate_server_config
tools.description: Generate deployment configs for the self-hosted license validation server. Docker, Fly.io, Railway, VPS, bare metal.

tools.name: generate_test_license_key
tools.description: Create randomized test keys for development and CI testing.

useCases: Add copy protection to a VST3/AU/AAX audio plugin
License a Unity or Unreal asset store product
Add licensing to an Electron or Tauri desktop app
License a game mod or development tool
Deploy a self-hosted license validation server
Generate machine fingerprinting code for any platform
